expectations.text: Identifies the Samsung first-load crash as a known issue
expectations.evidence: Step 1 Android 12+ section: 'Samsung devices have aggressive memory management that can kill the Expo Go process during initialization on the very first launch'

expectations.text: Mentions the SDK 53+ splash screen crash on Android 11 and below
expectations.evidence: Step 1 section: 'Expo Go SDK 53+ has a known crash on Android 11 and below — Binary XML inflating issue with splash screen views'

expectations.text: Suggests checking/updating the Expo Go version or downloading APK from expo.dev/go
expectations.evidence: Multiple mentions: 'Download the latest patched Expo Go APK from https://expo.dev/go' and 'update Expo Go from the Play Store'

expectations.text: Suggests using adb logcat to get crash logs for diagnosis
expectations.evidence: Step 5: 'adb logcat *:E | grep -i expo' and 'adb logcat -d > crash_log.txt'

expectations.text: Provides a structured troubleshooting sequence (not just a wall of possibilities)
expectations.evidence: 5-step sequential guide with numbered steps, plus a final checklist
